title: Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Varanasi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises:
Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahendra's Institute International Enterprises!
